name: Sahas
pageHeader: Sahas Uppalapati - Software Engineer building scalable and modern software.
pageDescription: I specialize in full-stack development, backend APIs, cloud-native systems, and practical AI/ML applications with measurable impact.

aboutTopics.title: Background
aboutTopics.body: I am a 2nd Year Computer Science student at Ohio State University, focused on shipping reliable software at scale. I've built full-stack products, production data tooling, and managed distrubuted systems in cloud environments. I have experience with the full software development lifecycle and am passionate about solving impactful user focused problems.

aboutTopics.title: Interests
aboutTopics.body: I'm interested in machine learning and its practical applications, especially in the areas of natural language processing and computer vision. I also enjoy working on cloud infrastructure and distributed systems, as well as building user-friendly web applications. I'm always eager to learn new technologies and explore how they can be used to solve real-world problems.

aboutTopics.title: Goals
aboutTopics.body: I want to build fast, reliable, and impactful software that helps solve the worlds most interesting problems. Long term, I am interested in founding my own company that leverages software to aid in solving humanities biggest challenges like climate change, energy and food production.

aboutTopics.title: Working Style
aboutTopics.body: I love working in team enviroments that push me to learn new skills to accomplish the task at hand. I enjoy learning from others and working together to solve ambigous problems and producing high quality work. I am a strong believer in the value of good communication and documentation to ensure that everyone is on the same page and that knowledge is shared across the team.
